Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 4 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10879 0 0}Dang, dude... You sure know how to dress to impress.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}I wanna get some new threads, but I don't have time for that now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}On the weekends, I just wear my track suits—helps me get my head in the game and all that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10893 0 0}That way, I'm ready to go 24/7, y'know? That's real dedication, man.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10823 0 0}{f 5 13 8 30 105}It's mental strength, man. That's what I'm all about.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}Nobody out there can beat me! Well, in spirit. You're not half-bad though, I'll give you that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Miyamoto seems to be having a lot of fun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10829 0 0}{f 5 13 8 15 105}Heh, you think you're some kinda big shot now just 'cause you beat me once?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}You better watch out, pal, 'cause next time you're goin' down! Er, once I'm in better condition...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}I thought she just didn't get the whole dedication thing... But if you're saying it, too, then maybe I'm coming off a little too strong?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10854 0 0}So, what's the plan? Should we just walk around and find a place to eat?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We walked around the strip mall for a little[n]while before I had to head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
